name: Clubhouse & Events
description: Society clubhouse for community events and celebration campaigns
briefInstructions: Commission a warm community gathering background artwork. The environment is a modern residential society clubhouse interior: well-designed hall, comfortable seating, tasteful decorations appropriate to the occasion, warm ambient lighting, large windows or glass walls, community banners or society name visible subtly in background. Residents — a diverse mix of families, seniors, young professionals — are gathered for a community event: some seated, some mingling, warm natural interaction. The atmosphere communicates: active community, quality of life, well-organized society life. NO product screens, NO software UI. Pure community warmth. Bottom 30% must be smooth and dark for text overlay.

inputs.label: Event or Festival
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Annual Day, Diwali Celebration, Sports Day

inputs.label: Event Message
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Celebrating community, connection, and great management
suggestions: Celebrating community, connection, and great society management
Great societies are built by engaged communities
Every event is better in a well-managed society
Bringing your community together — powered by SocietyBee
